---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# Get in touch
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<style>
.ccm-type-label {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--navy);
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  display: block;
}
.ccm-type-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.ccm-type-btn {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.18s, color 0.18s, border-color 0.18s, transform 0.15s;
}
.ccm-type-btn:hover {
  border-color: var(--navy);
  color: var(--navy);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.ccm-type-btn.active {
  background: var(--navy);
  color: #fff;
  border-color: var(--navy);
}
.ccm-type-btn.bug-btn {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  color: var(--accent);
}
.ccm-type-btn.bug-btn:hover,
.ccm-type-btn.bug-btn.active {
  background: var(--accent);
  border-color: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
}
.ccm-form-wrap {
  display: none;
  margin-top: 1.75rem;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 2rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  animation: ccmFadeUp 0.22s ease both;
}
.ccm-form-wrap.visible { display: block; }
@keyframes ccmFadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
.ccm-selected-type {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  display: block;
}
.ccm-selected-type.bug-label { color: var(--accent); }
.ccm-form-group { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }
.ccm-label {
  display: block;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy);
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}
.ccm-input {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.65rem 0.9rem;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #1a1a1a;
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  outline: none;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  transition: border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s;
}
.ccm-input:focus {
  border-color: var(--navy);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26,58,42,0.08);
  background: #fff;
}
.ccm-textarea { min-height: 120px; resize: vertical; line-height: 1.65; }
.ccm-footer-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
}
.ccm-submit {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.6rem 1.4rem;
  background: var(--navy);
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  border: 2px solid var(--navy);
  border-radius: 999px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.18s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,58,42,0.18);
}
.ccm-submit:hover {
  background: var(--navy-light);
  border-color: var(--navy-light);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(26,58,42,0.28);
}
.ccm-submit:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }
.ccm-clear {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0;
  transition: color 0.18s;
}
.ccm-clear:hover { color: var(--navy); }
.ccm-status {
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: 1.2em;
}
.ccm-status.success { color: #2d7a4f; }
.ccm-status.error   { color: #c0392b; }
</style>

<span class="ccm-type-label">What are you getting in touch about?</span>
<div class="ccm-type-row">
  <button type="button" class="ccm-type-btn" onclick="setType('research')">Research & collaboration</button>
  <button type="button" class="ccm-type-btn" onclick="setType('general')">General</button>
  <button type="button" class="ccm-type-btn bug-btn" id="bug-btn" onclick="setType('bug')">Report a website bug</button>
</div>

<div class="ccm-form-wrap" id="ccm-form-wrap">
  <span class="ccm-selected-type" id="ccm-selected-label"></span>
  <form id="contact-form" onsubmit="handleSubmit(event)">
    <input type="hidden" name="access_key" value="03b4348e-774c-4e7b-9300-f9f602cecc75">
    <input type="hidden" id="ccm-subject" name="subject" value="">

    <div class="ccm-form-group">
      <label class="ccm-label" for="f-name">Name</label>
      <input type="text" id="f-name" name="name" class="ccm-input" placeholder="Your name" required>
    </div>

    <div class="ccm-form-group">
      <label class="ccm-label" for="f-email">Email</label>
      <input type="email" id="f-email" name="email" class="ccm-input" placeholder="your@email.com" required>
    </div>

    <div class="ccm-form-group">
      <label class="ccm-label" for="f-message" id="f-message-label">Message</label>
      <textarea id="f-message" name="message" class="ccm-input ccm-textarea" placeholder="Your message..." required></textarea>
    </div>

    <div class="ccm-footer-row">
      <button type="submit" class="ccm-submit" id="submit-btn">Send message</button>
      <button type="button" class="ccm-clear" onclick="clearForm()">Clear</button>
    </div>
    <p id="ccm-status" class="ccm-status"></p>
  </form>
</div>

<script>
const config = {
  research: {
    label: 'Research & collaboration',
    subject: 'Research enquiry — connorconkeymorrison.com',
    placeholder: 'Briefly describe your research interest or proposed collaboration...',
  },
  general: {
    label: 'General',
    subject: 'General enquiry — connorconkeymorrison.com',
    placeholder: 'Your message...',
  },
  bug: {
    label: 'Report a website bug',
    subject: 'Bug report — connorconkeymorrison.com',
    placeholder: 'Describe the bug — what page, what happened, and what you expected...',
  },
};

function setType(type) {
  const c = config[type];

  document.querySelectorAll('.ccm-type-btn').forEach(btn => {
    const isBugBtn = btn.id === 'bug-btn';
    const isActive = btn.getAttribute('onclick') === `setType('${type}')`;
    btn.classList.toggle('active', isActive);
  });

  document.getElementById('ccm-subject').value = c.subject;
  document.getElementById('f-message').placeholder = c.placeholder;
  document.getElementById('ccm-selected-label').textContent = c.label;

  const wrap = document.getElementById('ccm-form-wrap');
  wrap.classList.remove('visible');
  void wrap.offsetWidth;
  wrap.classList.add('visible');
}

function clearForm() {
  document.getElementById('contact-form').reset();
  document.getElementById('ccm-subject').value = '';
  document.getElementById('ccm-selected-label').textContent = '';
  document.getElementById('ccm-form-wrap').classList.remove('visible');
  document.querySelectorAll('.ccm-type-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('ccm-status').textContent = '';
  document.getElementById('ccm-status').className = 'ccm-status';
}

async function handleSubmit(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const btn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
  const status = document.getElementById('ccm-status');
  btn.textContent = 'Sending...';
  btn.disabled = true;
  status.textContent = '';
  status.className = 'ccm-status';

  try {
    const res = await fetch('https://api.web3forms.com/submit', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: new FormData(document.getElementById('contact-form'))
    });
    const result = await res.json();
    if (result.success) {
      status.textContent = 'Message sent — thanks!';
      status.className = 'ccm-status success';
      clearForm();
    } else {
      throw new Error();
    }
  } catch {
    status.textContent = 'Something went wrong. Try emailing directly.';
    status.className = 'ccm-status error';
  }

  btn.textContent = 'Send message';
  btn.disabled = false;
}

// Auto-select bug type if arriving from template page
(function() {
  const ref = document.referrer;
  const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  if (params.get('type') === 'bug' || ref.includes('template')) {
    setType('bug');
  }
})();
</script>
```
